creator: dch@freebsd.org
text:
is there any value in having this as an actual port at all?

- normal usage is to install the archive, then `mix phx.new ...`
- it's not usable as a stand-alone application
- it's not a dependency for any other ports

I'm expecting to remove it per https://www.freebsd.org/status/report-2021-07-2021-09/#_freebsd_erlang_ecosystem_ports_update
